title: A cheap specialist judge gets used by agents but fails to reduce alignment audit costs
summary: A cheap specialist judge gets used by agents but fails to reduce alignment audit costs
whyItMatters: TL;DR I gave AuditBench's investigator agents a lightweight (Gemma 2-2B) EM-toxicity-scorer (judge) as an additional audit tool, targeting a proof-of-concept for misalignment detection at low cost, looking to validate that a specialized judge would (1) get used by these investigator agents, (2) help audits, (3) reduce overall evaluation spend Validation res…
